tools.description: Get the current weather for a location
tools.name: get_weather

location.description: The city and state, e.g. San Francisco, CA

tools.description: Get the current weather for a location
tools.name: get_weather

location.description: The city and state, e.g. San Francisco, CA

text:
Here are quick ideas you can pick from, based on today’s weather:

San Francisco (65°F, sunny)
- Outdoors: Golden Gate Park (picnic, bike ride), Crissy Field or Lands End for coastal views, walk along the Embarcadero, or a quick hike to Twin Peaks for city views.
- Food/relaxed: Lunch at the Ferry Building Marketplace, a coffee crawl in Hayes Valley, or a sunset view from a rooftop bar.
- Quick day trips: Ferry to Sausalito for a half-day.

New York (45°F, cloudy)
- Indoor culture: The Met, MoMA, Guggenheim, or American Museum of Natural History.
- Mix of indoors/outdoors: a stroll on the High Line (takes 1–2 hours) with a warm drink stop at Chelsea Market, or Bryant Park for warm beverages and people-watching.
- Evening options: Broadway show, or live jazz in a cozy venue in Harlem or the Village.

Want me to tailor a 2–3 hour plan or a specific activity list based on your interests (food, art, outdoors) and time, or pull an hourly forecast to fine-tune?
